text.title: Coverage Rebuild Playbook Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Coverage Rebuild Playbook end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: rank
step.action: Compute risk × churn; sort files into bands.

step.name: characterization-tests
step.action: Write characterization tests for current band.

step.name: ratchet-ci
step.action: Wire CI floor and weekly review.

step.name: validate-weekly
step.action: Run validator; adjust band if behind schedule.
